children.default: I'm a popover. I can show content of any size.

presets.name: Default
presets.children: I'm a popover. I can show content of any size.

presets.name: Right Start
presets.children: Popover aligned to the start of the right side

presets.name: Right End
presets.children: Popover aligned to the end of the right side

presets.name: Actionable Content
presets.children:
<Body textAlign="center">
  <Button
      onClick={() => alert('Example action')}
      text="Learn More"
  />
</Body>

presets.name: Scrollable
presets.children:
<Flex orientation="column">
  <Body
      marginBottom="sm"
      text="Long popover content can scroll when maxHeight is set. Keep the width constrained so the popover remains readable near the trigger."
  />
  <Title
      size={4}
      text="Scrollable content"
  />
</Flex>

presets.name: Custom Z Index
presets.children: I have a custom z-index of 3

presets.name: Append To Parent
presets.children: This popover is appended to the trigger parent.

reference.message: The playground wraps Popover with local state, a CircleIconButton reference, and shouldClosePopover so closeOnClick can update the open state.

close_inside.message: closeOnClick inside closes the popover after a click inside its body, which works well for button-style popovers.

list.message: Popover children can be composed from other kits, such as List and ListItem.

scrollable.message: maxHeight and maxWidth constrain large popover content and enable overflow handling.

z_index.message: zIndex is useful when a popover must sit above nearby positioned content.

append_to_parent.message: appendTo can be body, parent, or a selector. Use parent when the popover should stay inside the trigger's local stacking context.
